SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JOVAN TRENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERONICA RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRENT, JOVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, VERONICA DBA NEAT MOVING AND STORAGE $8,661.00 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,876.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
